scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:${VITE_PORT:-5173} && npm run build:electron && node scripts/start-electron-dev.cjs"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:electron && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
scripts.package:mac:dmg: npm run build && npm exec electron-builder -- --mac dmg
scripts.package:mac:adhoc: npm run build && npm exec electron-builder -- --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:win:installer: npm run build && npm exec electron-builder -- --win
scripts.dev:headless: SECOND_BRAIN_HEADLESS=1 VITE_PORT=5174 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 xvfb-run -a dbus-run-session -- npm run dev
